svg.title: HelixTerminator — Vault Encryption Architecture
svg.desc: Draw.io architecture diagram. Open in diagrams.net or draw.io desktop for interactive view. File: 03_vault_encryption.drawio

metadata.drawio-source:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <mxfile host="diagrams.net" modified="2026-06-28T00:00:00.000Z" agent="HelixTerminator Spec" version="21.0.0" type="device"> <diagram name="Vault Encryption Architecture" id="vault-enc-003"> <mxGraphModel dx="1422" dy="762" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" />
<!-- Title --> <mxCell id="title" value="HelixTerminator — Vault Encryption Architecture" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="300" y="20" width="1000" height="35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== KEY DERIVATION CHAIN (top) ===== --> <mxCell id="kd-label" value="Key Derivation Chain" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f8cecc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="75" width="220" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- User Password --> <mxCell id="user-pw" value="User Master Password" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="130" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow + Argon2id box --> <mxCell id="e-pw-argon" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#9673a6;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="190" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="210" y="190" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="210" y="250" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="argon2id" value="Argon2id KDF
(m=65536, t=3, p=4)" style="shape=process;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="255" width="180" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow + Master Key --> <mxCell id="e-argon-mk" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="310" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="210" y="310" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="210" y="370" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="master-key" value="Master Key
(256-bit AES)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="375" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow + Vault Key --> <mxCell id="e-mk-vk" value="Unwrap via
AES-256-GCM" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="435" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="210" y="435" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="210" y="500" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="vault-key" value="Vault Key
(256-bit AES-GCM)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="505" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow + Item Keys --> <mxCell id="e-vk-ik" value="Derive per-item" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="565" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="210" y="565" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="210" y="630" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="item-keys" value="Item Keys
(unique per vault item)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="635" width="180" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow + Encrypted Data --> <mxCell id="e-ik-data" value="Encrypt" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="695" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="210" y="695" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="210" y="760" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="enc-data" value="Encrypted Vault Items
(AES-256-GCM + HMAC)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="765" width="220" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- Arrow + PostgreSQL --> <mxCell id="e-data-pg" value="Store" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#82b366;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="825" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="210" y="825" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="210" y="890" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="postgres" value="PostgreSQL
(vault_items table)" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;size=10;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="895" width="200" height="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== HSM / KEY STORAGE SIDE ===== --> <mxCell id="hsm-label" value="HSM / Key Storage" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="75" width="220" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="hsm" value="Hardware Security Module
(HSM / AWS KMS)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="130" width="240" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="kek" value="Key Encryption Key (KEK)
(Wraps Master Key)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="255" width="240" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="e-hsm-kek" value="Stores KEK" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#666666;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="660" y="190" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="660" y="190" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="660" y="255" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="e-kek-mk" value="Wraps" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#b85450;endArrow=block;endFill=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="375" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="540" y="375" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="300" y="405" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- Key Rotation --> <mxCell id="key-rotation-svc" value="Key Rotation Service
(Scheduled: 90 days)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="430" width="240" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="e-rot-vk" value="Re-encrypts
vault keys" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="460" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="540" y="460" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="300" y="535" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== VAULT ITEM TYPES ===== --> <mxCell id="items-label" value="Vault Item Types" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#dae8fc;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="900" y="75" width="220" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<mxCell id="item-ssh-key" value="SSH Private Keys
(RSA/Ed25519)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="130" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="item-password" value="Passwords &
Credentials" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1050" y="130" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="item-cert" value="TLS/SSH
Certificates" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="200" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="item-snippet" value="Secure Snippets /
TOTP Seeds" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1050" y="200" width="160" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- All items → item keys --> <mxCell id="e-items-ik1" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="950" y="270" relative="1" as="geometry"><mxPoint x="950" y="270" as="sourcePoint"/><mxPoint x="300" y="660" as="targetPoint"/></mxGeometry> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== ZERO KNOWLEDGE NOTE ===== --> <mxCell id="zk-note" value="Zero-Knowledge Architecture:
• Server never sees plaintext data
• Master key derived client-side only
• All crypto operations in client memory
• Server stores only encrypted blobs
• PBKDF salt stored separately from ciphertext" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=20;fillColor=#fffde7;strokeColor=#d6b656;align=left;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="870" y="600" width="360" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== ENCRYPTION SPEC NOTE ===== --> <mxCell id="enc-note" value="Encryption Spec:
• Algorithm: AES-256-GCM
• AEAD Auth Tag: 128-bit
• Random IV: 96-bit (per item)
• MAC: HMAC-SHA256
• KDF: Argon2id (RFC 9106)" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=20;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;align=left;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="540" y="600" width="300" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
<!-- ===== DB SCHEMA ===== --> <mxCell id="db-schema" value="vault_items schema:
 id UUID PK
 vault_id UUID FK
 encrypted_data BYTEA
 iv BYTEA (96-bit)
 auth_tag BYTEA
 item_key_id UUID FK
 created_at TIMESTAMP" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=20;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;align=left;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="380" y="870" width="280" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
</root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

svg.text: Open 03_vault_encryption.drawio in app.diagrams.net for interactive rendering
